message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  DatabaseBorderColor #666666
  DatabaseBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor User as U
participant Index as I
participant "User\nController" as C
database Database as D

U -> I : GET: /users/signup
activate I

I -> C : renderSignup()
activate C

C -> C : render(index)

C --> I : display signup
deactivate C

I -> I : POST: /users/signup

I -> C : async signup()
activate C

C -> D : User.findOne(email)
activate D

alt [user not found]
  D --> C : return false
  deactivate D

  alt [accept]
    C -> C : User.create()
    C --> I : display home
  else [refuse]
    C --> I : display home
  end

else [user already exist]
  D --> C
  deactivate D
  C --> I : show error
end

deactivate C
deactivate I
@enduml
